title: C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church
tagline: C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Ellis Memorial Church is a church affiliated with the Church of South India in the CSI Compound, Dharapuram (Tamil Nadu), India.
overview.description: Ellis Memorial Church is a church affiliated with the Church of South India in the CSI Compound, Dharapuram (Tamil Nadu), India. It was built in the 19th century by Rev. J. J. Ellis and rebuilt again with the status of a cathedral by the British in 1893. It was designed in the Neo-Gothic style favoured by British architects of the late 19th-century.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dharapuram block
topPlaces.description: Dharapuram block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one among 16 revenue blocks in Tiruppur district.

topPlaces.name: Dharapuram division
topPlaces.description: Dharapuram division or Dharapuram sub-district is a revenue division in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is One Of The Three Revenue Divisions of Tiruppur district Other Two are Tiruppur and Udumalaipettai block.

topPlaces.name: Dharapuram
topPlaces.description: Dharapuram is a town situated along the banks of Amaravati River in Thiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Dharapuram is one of the oldest towns in South India and was the capital of Kongu Nadu under the Cheras, Western Ganga Dynasty and later Kongu Cholas, at which time it was known as Veeradapuram.

topPlaces.name: Kolathupalayam
topPlaces.description: Kolathupalayam is a panchayat town in Dharapuram taluk of Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 15 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Uppar River
topPlaces.description: Upparu River is a river flowing in the Tirupur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Nallathangal Dam
topPlaces.description: Nallathangal Dam is a dam Near Dharapuram in Tirupur district of Tamil Nadu, south India.

items.note: Dharapuram block is a revenue block in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is one among 16 revenue blocks in Tiruppur district.

Dharapuram division or Dharapuram sub-district is a revenue division in the Tiruppur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is One Of The Three Revenue Divisions of Tiruppur district Other Two are Tiruppur and Udumalaipettai block.

Dharapuram is a town situated along the banks of Amaravati River in Thiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Dharapuram is one of the oldest towns in South India and was the capital of Kongu Nadu under the Cheras, Western Ganga Dynasty and later Kongu Cholas, at which time it was known as Veeradapuram.
Kolathupalayam is a panchayat town in Dharapuram taluk of Tiruppur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 15 panchayat towns in the district.
Upparu River is a river flowing in the Tirupur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Nallathangal Dam is a dam Near Dharapuram in Tirupur district of Tamil Nadu, south India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church?
faq.a: Stays in C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in C.S.I Ellis Memorial Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dharapuram block, Dharapuram division, Dharapuram, Kolathupalayam, Uppar River.
